text: A woman stands in the surf with a surfboard.
Some players in action on the baseball field.
A young girl is writing at a table with many bushels of bananas.
A partial picture of a woman bouncing a tennis ball on the ground with her racket.
An orange with the end cut off against the sections is shown from above.
A street sign and traffic light on a lamp post.
Cows are sitting in the dirt near a ramp.
a living room with a fireplace and a picture frame
A streetlight is on a pole next to a wall.
A teddy bear with a red dog on its lap.
